sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n51990" key="kaino/spoudos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καινό-σπουδος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n51990.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fond of novelty</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὸ περὶ τὰς νοήσεις κ</foreign>. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Longin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
